overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked Night City commercial district at night. The journey progresses from a covered walkway lined with digital billboards toward a massive holographic phoenix display in an open plaza, with neon reflections on wet pavement and crowds of pedestrians throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: camera transitions to third-person view following the character as they begin walking
character crosses the wet street using the yellow crosswalk lines

agents.ego_description: crossing the rain-soaked street and entering the covered commercial walkway, walking alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and blue cap walking alongside ego
pedestrian in dark suit walking ahead of the group

entered.detail: rain-soaked road surface reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
massive illuminated screen displaying animated advertisements on the building facade
overhead structure providing shelter over the commercial street
painted zebra crossing lines on the wet pavement
vertical illuminated signage on the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked Night City street at night, with neon reflections on the wet asphalt. The camera transitions to third-person perspective following a character crossing the street via a yellow crosswalk. Large digital billboards illuminate the covered commercial walkway ahead, while other pedestrians walk alongside the ego character toward the sheltered arcade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with continuous digital displays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overhead structure, passing various shop fronts and digital displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and gray jacket walking ahead on the left
group of pedestrians walking in the same direction along the walkway

entered.detail: continuous wall of multiple digital advertisement screens displaying various neon content
row of palm trees planted along the edge of the walkway
black and yellow striped barriers separating the sidewalk from the street level
large rectangular concrete structure with palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees and yellow safety barriers. The left side features a continuous wall of digital billboards displaying neon advertisements, while the overhead structure provides shelter from the rain. Moderate crowds of pedestrians walk in the same direction through this commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from covered walkway to open plaza with holographic display

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open plaza area with the holographic phoenix visible ahead
ambient lighting shifts from enclosed neon to open plaza with massive orange holographic illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as it opens up, approaching the large holographic phoenix display visible in the distance ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the holographic display ahead

entered.detail: massive orange glowing holographic bird with spread wings floating above the plaza center
raised roadway with moving vehicle traffic visible in the background
small illuminated shop structure with 'CYBERWARE' signage and red neon lighting
open area ahead with distant skyscrapers and colorful neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The covered walkway opens up to reveal an expansive plaza dominated by a massive holographic phoenix glowing orange in the distance. The environment transitions from enclosed to open, with the elevated highway visible to the left and a cyberware vendor booth on the sidewalk. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to include the dramatic holographic illumination as crowds walk toward the display.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza dominated by holographic phoenix display

events.description: approaching closer to the holographic phoenix, camera moves deeper into the plaza center

agents.ego_description: walking toward the massive holographic phoenix display, surrounded by other pedestrians in the open plaza

entered.detail: building facade with green and blue neon strip lighting at ground level
open concrete area at the center of the plaza with the holographic display overhead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the center of the open plaza where the massive holographic phoenix dominates the skyline, glowing intensely orange against the night sky. The surrounding area features illuminated building bases with colorful neon strips, while pedestrians move through the plaza. The camera moves closer to the holographic display, which appears larger and more detailed as the segment progresses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked commercial district that transitions from a sheltered neon corridor into a vast, open plaza dominated by a holographic spectacle. It begins with a third-person perspective following a character across a wet asphalt street, moving through a yellow crosswalk toward a covered walkway illuminated by digital billboards. As the character enters the sheltered arcade, the scene shifts into a linear corridor lined with palm trees and safety barriers, where a wall of neon advertisements glows against the falling rain. The environment then expands as the walkway opens into a wide plaza, shifting the lighting from artificial neon to the dramatic orange glow of a massive holographic phoenix in the distance. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the crowds and past a cyberware booth, moving deeper into the open square until the towering holographic bird dominates the skyline.
